---
pagetitle: "Reading List - Architecture 2.0"
description: "Curated papers, blog posts, talks, datasets, and workshop writeups for Architecture 2.0."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
listing:
  - id: reading-list
    contents: readings.yml
    template: _reading-card.ejs.md
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: false
    fields: [title, description, kind, venue, when, authors, doi, categories]
    field-required: [title, url, description, kind, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="site-wrap">
<header class="site-masthead">
  <span class="pill">Architecture 2.0</span>
  <span class="pill hot">Curated resources</span>
</header>

<section class="site-hero">
  <div class="hub-kicker">Reading list</div>
  <h1>Readings</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Papers, posts, talks, datasets, and workshop writeups that orient the field</p>
</section>

<p class="site-lede">
This is the hub's curated starting point for Architecture 2.0 references. It is
not meant to replace a bibliography; it points newcomers and submitters toward
the papers, essays, talks, and artifacts that explain the motivation, evidence
standards, and community infrastructure around AI-assisted computer architecture.
</p>

<nav class="site-actions" aria-label="Reading list actions">
  <a class="site-action" href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/arch2/issues/new?template=submit_resource.yml">Submit a resource <span class="arr">&rarr;</span></a>
  <a class="site-action secondary" href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/arch2/discussions">Discuss a reading</a>
  <a class="site-action tertiary" href="/tools/index.html">Browse tools</a>
</nav>

<div class="category-strip" aria-label="Reading categories">
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('')">All</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QXJjaGl0ZWN0dXJlJTIwMi4w')">Architecture 2.0</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('UGFwZXJz')">Papers</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QmxvZyUyMHBvc3Rz')">Blog posts</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QWdlbnRpYyUyMEFJ')">Agentic AI</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('QmVuY2htYXJrcyUyMGFuZCUyMERhdGFzZXRz')">Benchmarks and datasets</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('VG9vbHMlMjBhbmQlMjBJbmZyYXN0cnVjdHVyZQ==')">Tools and infrastructure</button>
  <button type="button" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('VGFsa3M=')">Talks</button>
</div>
</div>
```

:::{#reading-list}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  var listing = window.quartoListings?.["listing-reading-list"] ||
    window["quarto-listings"]?.["listing-reading-list"];
  var input = document.querySelector("#listing-reading-list .search");
  if (!listing || !input) {
    return;
  }
  input.addEventListener("input", function () {
    listing.search(input.value);
  });
});
</script>
```
